title: oxydectes suavis
side_effects: Oxydectes suavis can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, vomiting, and dizziness, which can be caused by excessive consumption of its toxic compounds. In severe cases, it can lead to respiratory failure, seizures, and even coma due to the high levels of toxic alkaloids present in the plant. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can also cause skin irritation, allergic reactions, and inflammation in some individuals. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for any health purposes to avoid these side effects.
